name: Purse Play Set - Gigglescape™: Fits 14-Inch Dolls, Includes Comb, Lotion, Toy Keys, Sunglasses, and Cell Phone
description:
Make playdates even more fun for your tiny tot with the Purse Play Set from Gigglescape™. The play set include toy keys, sunglasses, a purse, play credit card, lotion, comb, toy cell phone (with 5 different sounds) and more to provide countless hours of fun at home. Each piece has a cute look and feel, and the set is great for playtime and suggested for ages two and up.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
